---
title: cousera-machine_learning_week2
author: xiaoyu
date: '2020-09-12'
slug: cousera-machine-learning-week2
output: 
  html_document:
   toc: true
 
categories:
  - Machine Learning
tags:
  - gradient descent
  - Octave
  - multivariable
  - feature scaling
  - normal equation
draft: yes
---
这是该系列笔记的第二篇。包含：多变量线性回归、feature scaling & mean normalization、Normal equation、Octave基本操作。

# 多变量线性回归

## 假设函数：
$$h_\theta(x)= \theta_0 + \theta_1x_1+\theta_2x_2+ ... +\theta_nx_n（定义x_0 =1）\\向量化： h\theta_(x) = \theta^T x（\theta, x \in R^{n+1}）$$
## 损失函数

$$J(\theta) = \frac{1}{2m}\times \sum_{i=1}^{m}(h_\theta(x^{(i)} - y^{(i)})^2$$
# 梯度下降法

## 选择 $\alpha$

# feature scaling & mean normalization

# 运用Normal Equation

# Octave基础操作
